suggestedTarget: S.UnknownFromJsonString + S.encodeUnknownEffect (or a dedicated { name: string } ollama-pull-payload schema)
note: Serializes a small { name: model } payload to a JSON string that is shell-quoted and embedded in an `ollama api pull` curl command (ollamaBootstrapCommand). No schema models this ad-hoc payload. Replacing with S.encodeUnknownEffect(S.UnknownFromJsonString) turns this pure synchronous expression into an Effect, which would force ollamaBootstrapCommand (currently a pure (model) => ReadonlyArray<string>) to become effectful. Human should decide whether to model a tiny { name: S.String } schema and run encode inside the surrounding Effect, or keep a pure escape hatch.
